title: disqualifiers.yml
description: Hard dealbreakers + soft concerns read by the hunt scorer (jobify.profile_loader.load_disqualifiers()). hard_disqualifiers short-circuit a posting into the 'disqualify' tier; soft_concerns lower the score and should be surfaced in the scorer's reasoning. Both are lists of free-text strings the LLM reads.

hard_disqualifiers.description: Dealbreakers. A posting matching any of these is floored and not surfaced.

soft_concerns.description: Non-fatal concerns. Drag the score down; the scorer should call them out.
